user.title: Binary MoIP
user.description: Connect to your Binary MoIP controller. REST is tried first; TCP port 23 is used as a fallback.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the controller via REST or TCP.

init.title: Binary MoIP options
init.description: Choose what to configure. Select IR display control to paste Pronto codes for older displays.

devices.title: Receivers & transmitters
devices.description: Expand a device to enable/disable it or change its name, then submit to return to the menu.

ir_menu.title: IR display control
ir_menu.description: Select a receiver to configure IR Pronto codes for power, volume, and mute.

ir_codes.title: IR codes for {receiver}
ir_codes.description: Set display power to IR, then paste Pronto hex codes. Mute is a toggle. Leave a field blank to clear it.
